ABOUT ME

Hi, I'm Kaley!

I specialize in translating organizational complexity into streamlined systems and processes — the kind that reduce friction, improve clarity, and scale.

As a CAPM candidate with hands-on experience across operations, QA, product strategy, and UX auditing, I bring a practical, cross-functional approach to improving how work gets done. My recent work spans nonprofit operations, self-directed education projects where my systems tools reached 100+ educators, and identifying 70+ usability improvements across a nonprofit's digital ecosystem.

I'm proficient across platforms including Asana, Jira, Notion, and ClickUp, and I work fluidly with AI tools to accelerate research, workflow design, and documentation.

I'm drawn to roles where strategic thinking, process ownership, and clear communication are valued — particularly in ops, product operations, or project coordination. ✿
